subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending the mention of servants and the remembrance of contingent beings, befitteth the most holy and most exalted Court of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر خادم و ذکر ممکنات بساط امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق که
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
